parameters.content:
## Workflow 6: Feedback Listener

**Trigger:** Twilio webhook POST (always active)

**Webhook URL:** Copy the production URL from the Webhook node and register it in Twilio WhatsApp sender or Messaging Service inbound settings.

**Logic:**
1. Receives Twilio WhatsApp fields: From, To, Body, ButtonText, ButtonPayload, MessageSid, WaId, ProfileName, NumMedia
2. Extracts sender phone + message body (button taps take priority)
3. Finds matching patient in Supabase by phone number
4. Classifies response (confirmed / cancelled / help / book / responded)
5. Updates patient record in Supabase
6. On confirmation with follow_up_date: creates patient_visits queue entry (idempotent)
7. Sends an optional free-form auto-reply inside the 24-hour customer service window
8. Logs to Supabase system_logs

**Before activating:**
1. Set credential on Postgres nodes -> Supabase DB
2. Set credential on HTTP Request node -> Twilio Basic Auth
3. Set Twilio inbound webhook to /webhook/feedback-listener

parameters.query:
=WITH candidates AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM public.patients p
  WHERE p.phone = '{{ $('Parse and Classify Message').first().json._from_phone }}'
), latest_messaged AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM candidates p
  JOIN public.message_logs ml
    ON ml.clinic_id = p.clinic_id
   AND ml.patient_id = p.id
  ORDER BY ml.sent_at DESC NULLS LAST, p.updated_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
), single_candidate AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM candidates
  WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM candidates) = 1
)
SELECT * FROM latest_messaged
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM single_candidate
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest_messaged)
LIMIT 1

=UPDATE public.patients SET response_status = '{{ $json._response_status_db }}', last_response = '{{ $json._message_body.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json._patient_id }}' AND clinic_id = '{{ $json._clinic_id }}'

=SELECT id FROM public.patient_visits WHERE patient_id = '{{ $('Prepare Reply').item.json._patient_id }}' AND visit_date = '{{ $('Prepare Reply').item.json._follow_up_date }}' AND visit_status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'no_show') LIMIT 1

=INSERT INTO public.patient_visits ( patient_id, patient_code, clinic_id, clinic_name, doctor_name, visit_date, visit_status, chief_complaint, staff_notes, checked_in_at ) VALUES ( '{{ $('Prepare Reply').item.json._patient_id }}', '{{ ($('Prepare Reply').item.json._patient_code || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Prepare Reply').item.json._clinic_id }}', '{{ ($('Prepare Reply').item.json._clinic_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($('Prepare Reply').item.json._doctor_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Prepare Reply').item.json._follow_up_date }}', 'waiting', 'Follow-up consultation', 'Auto-confirmed via WhatsApp', NOW() ) RETURNING id

value.message: Follow-up visit added to waiting queue after WhatsApp confirmation
value.details: ={{ JSON.stringify({ patient_id: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._patient_id, follow_up_date: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._follow_up_date, visit_id: $json.id, button_triggered: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._button_triggered }) }}

value.message: Failed to create follow-up visit in waiting queue
value.details: ={{ JSON.stringify({ patient_id: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._patient_id, follow_up_date: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._follow_up_date, button_triggered: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._button_triggered, error: $json.error?.message || $json.message || 'patient_visits insert failed' }) }}

nodes.name: Log Queue Insert Error to Supabase

value.details: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phone: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._from_phone, message: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._message_body, classification: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._classification }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ patient_id: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._patient_id, phone: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._from_phone, classification: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._classification, message: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._message_body, button_triggered: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._button_triggered, queue_entry_requested: $('Prepare Reply').item.json._should_create_queue_entry }) }}
